o.style.cssText='position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:2147483647;background:#000;color:#fff;font:14px/1.4 sans-serif;padding:16px;overflow:auto;'; o.addEventListener('click',()=>{ 致命的エラー

'+String(msg).replace(/[&<>]/g,s=>({"&":"&","<":"<",">":">"}[s]))+'

(クリックで閉じる)
'; }catch(_e){} } window.__ER_showFatal = showFatal; window.addEventListener('error', (e)=>{ // SyntaxError等で止まると白になるので、画面に出す try{ const msg = (e && (e.error && e.error.stack)) ? e.error.stack : (e && e.message ? e.message : String(e)); showFatal(msg); }catch(_e){} }); window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', (e)=>{ try{ const r = e && e.reason; const msg = r && r.stack ? r.stack : String(r); showFatal(msg); }catch(_e){} }); // ---- deep sanitizer: remove data/blob/about urls and huge blobs from objects ---- function isBadUrl(v){ return (typeof v==='string') && (v.startsWith('data:') || v.startsWith('blob:') || v.startsWith('about:')); } function sanitizeDeep(v, depth){ if(depth<=0) return null; if(v==null) return v; const t=typeof v; if(t==='string'){ return isBadUrl(v) ? } }; if(type==='normal'){ killPrefix('genko'); killPrefix('misfire'); }else if(type==='hit'){ killPrefix('misfire'); }else if(type==='miss'){ killPrefix('genko'); } }catch(_e){} return obj; } function saveSettings(){ // (r325/r330) ガード：S3発火直後の短い区間は保存しない。 // - S3 UIの保存（commit）が必要な場合は、区間終了後に保存を延期（発火直後の誤保存を避けつつ、記憶は担保）。 // - それ以外は保存をスキップ。 try{ const inCd = (typeof window.__S3_isInSaveCooldown==='function') && window.__S3_isInSaveCooldown(); }catch(_e){} } return false; } }catch(_e){} // pill を保存ステータス表示に使う（右上HUDは使わない） const pill=document.getElementById('pill'); const setPill=(msg,ms=1200)=>{ if(!pill) return; pill.textContent=msg; pill.style.opacity=1; clearTimeout(pill._t); pill._t=setTimeout(()=>{ pill.textContent='LOCAL'; pill.title=''; },ms); }; try{ // まず容量を食っている退避キーを掃除（自動） const __purge = __lsCleanupEndroll(); // (r213) 強制同期：保存直前にUI→STATE.s3へ確定（配線漏れ・遅延での取りこぼし防止） // ただし「S3入力(change/blur)のときだけ」実行する。S2側の保存等でS3が巻き込まれて重くなるのを防ぐ。 const __doS3CommitOnSave = !!(window.__S3_COMMIT_ON_NEXT_SAVE); }catch(_e){} try{ window.__S3_SAVE_GUARD = false; }catch(_e){} } try{ const s3 = (STATE && STATE.s3) ? STATE.s3 : null; if(s3){ // ensure presets exist try{ s3.presets = s3.presets || {}; const d = (window.S3_DEFAULT && window.S3_DEFAULT.presets) ? window.S3_DEFAULT.presets : null; const mk = (k)=>Object.assign({}, (d&&d[k])?d[k]:{}, s3.presets[k]||{}); s3.presets.normal = __s3_sanitizePresetByType('normal', mk('normal')); s3.presets.hit = __s3_sanitizePresetByType('hit', mk('hit')); s3.presets.miss = __s3_sanitizePresetByType('miss', mk('miss')); }catch(_e){} const __selPE = document.getElementById('s3_preset'); const __peDom = (__selPE && (__selPE.value==='hit' || __selPE.value==='miss')) ? __selPE.value : 'normal'; const __peState = (s3 && (s3.presetEdit==='hit' || s3.presetEdit==='miss')) ? s3.presetEdit : 'normal'; const pe = (__peDom || __peState || 'normal'); try{ if(s3 && s3.presetEdit!==pe) s3.presetEdit = pe; }catch(_e){} // NOTE(r224): saveSettings() は "保存" のみを担当し、ここでは UI 数値(破片/紙吹雪/テープ/幻光虫/不発煙) を STATE に書き戻さない。 // 目的：プリセット切替の瞬間に UI と presetEdit がズレた状態で save が走り、別プリセットへ誤上書きされる事故（burstN が 0→4 に戻る等）を防ぐ。 } }catch(_e){} const st=JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(STATE)); __sanitizeForStorage(st); const __s = __sanitizeForStorage._lastStats || {urlClr:0,drop:0}; const json=JSON.stringify(st); const __bytes = (new TextEncoder().encode(json)).length; try{ localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY,json); try{ __s3DiagPush('save_ok',{bytes:__bytes, sanitize:__s, snap:__s3DiagMiniSnap()}); }catch(_e){} setPill('保存: OK'); return true; }catch(e){ // Quota超過が多いので1回だけ救済リトライ const name = (e && (e.name||e.constructor?.name)) || ''; const isQuota = (name==='QuotaExceededError') || (String(e).includes('Quota')); if(isQuota){ const removed = __lsCleanupEndroll(); __sanitizeForStorage(st); const __s = __sanitizeForStorage._lastStats || {urlClr:0,drop:0}; const json2 = JSON.stringify(st); localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY,json2); try{ __s3DiagPush('save_ok_after_cleanup',{removed:removed, snap:__s3DiagMiniSnap()}); }catch(_e){} setPill(`保存: OK(整理${removed})`); return true; } throw e; } }catch(e){ const name = (e && (e.name||e.constructor?.name)) || ''; const isQuota = (name==='QuotaExceededError') || (String(e).includes('Quota')); setPill(isQuota ? return false; } } // ---- S3 DIAG helpers (r223) ---- function __s3DiagMiniSnap(){ try{ const s3 = (window.STATE && window.STATE.s3) ? window.STATE.s3 : null; if(!s3) return null; const pick = (k)=>({ burstN: s3.presets?.[k]?.burstN, paperN: s3.presets?.[k]?.paperN, tapeN: s3.presets?.[k]?.tapeN, genkoN: s3.presets?.[k]?.genkoN, genkoProb: s3.presets?.[k]?.genkoProb, misfireCount: s3.presets?.[k]?.misfireCount, misfireLifeMul: s3.presets?.[k]?.misfireLifeMul }); return { enabled: !!s3.enabled, mode: s3.mode, hitRate: s3.hitRate, missRate: s3.missRate, presetEdit: s3.presetEdit, presets: { normal: pick('normal'), hit: pick('hit'), miss: pick('miss') } }; }catch(_e){ return null; } } function __s3DiagPush(kind, obj){ try{ if(!window.STATE) return; if(!Array.isArray(window.STATE.s3_diag_log)) window.STATE.s3_diag_log = []; const rec = Object.assign({ts:(new Date()).toISOString(), kind}, obj||{}); window.STATE.s3_diag_log.push(rec); if(window.STATE.s3_diag_log.length > 5000){ window.STATE.s3_diag_log.splice(0, window.STATE.s3_diag_log.length - 5000); } }catch(_e){} } // ---- /S3 DIAG helpers ---- function setSaveStatus(msg){ const el=document.getElementById('saveStatus'); if(!el) return; el.textContent=msg||''; el.style.opacity=msg?1:0; if(msg){ clearTimeout(el._t); el._t=setTimeout(()=>{el.style.opacity=0;},1500); } } function applyVisual(){ $('bg').style.backgroundImage = STATE.bgUrl?`url("${STATE.bgUrl}")`:''; $('monkeyImg').src = STATE.monkeyUrl||''; $('bearImg').src = STATE.bearUrl||''; $('tvImgEl').src = STATE.tvImgUrl||''; setRootVar('--tvimg-opacity', String(clamp(STATE.tvImgOpacity/100,0,1))); setRootVar('--font-size', STATE.fontSize+'px'); setRootVar('--line-height', String(STATE.lineHeight)); setRootVar('--simg-scale', String(STATE.simgScale)); setRootVar('--bar-maxh', STATE.barMaxH+'px'); setRootVar('--tv-xr', STATE.tv.xr);setRootVar('--tv-yr', STATE.tv.yr);setRootVar('--tv-wr', STATE.tv.wr);setRootVar('--tv-hr', STATE.tv.hr); // camera setRootVar('--cam-x', (STATE.cam?.x||0)+'px'); setRootVar('--cam-y', (STATE.cam?.y||0)+'px'); setRootVar('--cam-w', (STATE.cam?.w||0)+'px'); setRootVar('--cam-h', (STATE.cam?.h||0)+'px'); document.body.classList.toggle('camOff', !(STATE.cam&&STATE.cam.enabled)); updateCamMask(); $('tv').classList.toggle('debug', !!STATE.tvDebug); } function updateCamMask(){ // Create a mask so #bg has a transparent "hole" where the camera should appear (OBS camera source underlay). try{ if(!STATE.cam || !STATE.cam.enabled){ $('bg').style.webkitMaskImage=''; $('bg').style.maskImage=''; return; } const W=1920, H=1080; const x=Math.max(0, Math.min(W, Number(STATE.cam.x)||0)); const y=Math.max(0, Math.min(H, Number(STATE.cam.y)||0)); const w=Math.max(0, Math.min(W, Number(STATE.cam.w)||0)); const h=Math.max(0, Math.min(H, Number(STATE.cam.h)||0)); // SVG alpha mask: white = visible, black = transparent const svg = ``; const url = 'url("data:image/svg+xml;utf8,' + encodeURIComponent(svg) + '")'; $('bg').style.webkitMaskImage=url; $('bg').style.maskImage=url; }catch(e){} } function el(tag,cls,text){const n=document.createElement(tag); if(cls) n.className=cls; if(text!=null) n.textContent=text; return n;} function addLine(parent,cls,text){ const t = (text===undefined||text===null) ? '' : String(text); const shown = (t.length===0) ? '\u00A0' : t; const n = el('div','line '+(cls||''),shown); parent.appendChild(n); } function parseNames(txt){ return (txt||'').split(/\r?\n/).map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean); } function makeDummyNames(n){ const out=[]; for(let i=1;i<=n;i++) out.push(`${STATE.dummyPrefix} ${String(i).padStart(2,'0')}`); return out; } function packNamesToRows(names,maxPerRow){ // return array of arrays; long names -> reduce columns const rows=[]; let i=0; while(is.length)); if(longest>18) take=1; else if(longest>12) take=2; const row=names.slice(i,i+take); rows.push(row); i+=take; } return rows; } function buildViewerBlock(parent, label){ const all=makeDummyNames(STATE.dummyCount); // distribute roughly by category name hash to keep stable const bucket=[]; for(let i=0;i0){ const sp=document.createElement('div'); sp.className='hdrGapSpacer'; sp.style.height = g + 'px'; root.appendChild(sp); }else{ addLine(root,'',''); } } const renderedBlocks=[]; for(const item of STATE.order){ if(!item.enabled) continue; let did=false; if(item.id==='chat') did=buildViewerBlock(root,0); else if(item.id==='chanepo') did=buildViewerBlock(root,1); else if(item.id==='sub') did=buildViewerBlock(root,2); else if(item.id==='bits') did=buildViewerBlock(root,3); else if(item.id==='gift') did=buildViewerBlock(root,4); else if(item.id.startsWith('simg_')){ const n=parseInt(item.id.replace('simg_',''),10); did=buildSimgBlock(root, n-1); } else if(item.id.startsWith('fanart_')){ const n=parseInt(item.id.replace('fanart_',''),10); did=buildFanartBlock(root, n-1); } else if(item.id.startsWith('special')){ const idx=parseInt(item.id.replace('special',''),10)-1; did=buildSpecialBlock(root,idx); } if(did){ renderedBlocks.push({id:item.id,barAfter:!!item.barAfter}); addLine(root,'',''); addLine(root,'',''); // bar AFTER this block, but only if there's a next rendered block later if(item.barAfter){ // mark placeholder, decide later const ph=el('div','barPlaceholder'); ph.dataset.after=item.id; root.appendChild(ph); } addLine(root,'',''); } } // resolve bar placeholders: only keep if there is any rendered block after it const afterSet=new Set(renderedBlocks.map(b=>b.id)); const ids=renderedBlocks.map(b=>b.id); for(const ph of Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('.barPlaceholder'))){ const after=ph.dataset.after; const pos=ids.indexOf(after); const hasNext = pos>=0 && pos < ids.length-1; if(hasNext && STATE.barUrl) { const wrap=el('div','barWrap'); const img=document.createElement('img'); img.src=STATE.barUrl; img.alt='bar'; wrap.appendChild(img); ph.replaceWith(wrap); }else{ ph.remove(); } } if(!STATE.loopEnable){ // spacer so previous lines can scroll out during stop addLine(root,'',''); addLine(root,'',''); addLine(root,'hdr', STATE.endText || 'おわり'); } } function stopScroll(){ if(rafId){cancelAnimationFrame(rafId); rafId=null;} } function startScroll(){ stopScroll(); // clear end effects const sc0=$('scrollContent'); sc0.classList.remove('effect-shadow','effect-fade','effect-zoom'); buildContent(); const tv=$('tv'); const trans=$('scrollTranslate'); // force layout const tvH=tv.clientHeight; const contentH=$('scrollContent').scrollHeight; const startY=tvH; let endY; if(STATE.loopEnable){ endY = -contentH; }else{ const targetRatio=0.60; // fixed const targetY=tvH*targetRatio; const endLineOffset = contentH - targetY; endY = -endLineOffset; } const _sec = Number(STATE.scrollSec); const scrollSec = Number.isFinite(_sec) && _sec>0 ? _sec : 35; const pxPerSec = Math.max(10, 2400 / Math.max(5, scrollSec)); const distance = Math.abs(endY - startY); const duration = Math.max(1000, (distance / pxPerSec) * 1000); const t0=performance.now(); function frame(now){ const p=Math.min(1,(now-t0)/duration); const y=startY + (endY-startY)*p; trans.style.transform=`translateY(${y}px)`; if(p<1){ rafId=requestAnimationFrame(frame); }else{ rafId=null; if(STATE.loopEnable){ startScroll(); } // loop OFF: stop there (no auto restart) // apply end effect (no translate interference) const sc=$('scrollContent'); sc.classList.remove('effect-shadow','effect-fade'); if($('scrollTranslate')){} // keep if(STATE.endEffect==='shadow') sc.classList.add('effect-shadow'); if(STATE.endEffect==='fade') sc.classList.add('effect-fade'); if(STATE.endEffect==='zoom') sc.classList.add('effect-zoom'); } } // init trans.style.transform=`translateY(${startY}px)`; rafId=requestAnimationFrame(frame); } /* ---------- UI ---------- */ function openSettings(){ $('backdrop').style.display='block'; $('backdrop').setAttribute('aria-hidden','false'); } function closeSettings(){ $('backdrop').style.display='none'; $('backdrop').setAttribute('aria-hidden','true'); } // stage click opens settings (ignore when clicking inside backdrop) $('stage').addEventListener('click',(e)=>{ // when backdrop is open, clicks must not reopen if($('backdrop').style.display==='block') return; // ignore any click that originated inside the modal subtree if(e.target && e.target.closest && e.target.closest('#backdrop')) return; openSettings(); }); $('backdrop').addEventListener('click',(e)=>{ if(e.target===$('backdrop')){ e.stopPropagation(); closeSettings(); } }); window.addEventListener('keydown',(e)=>{ if(e.key==='Escape') closeSettings(); }); $('panel').addEventListener('click',(e)=>{ e.stopPropagation(); }); function switchTab(id){ for(const btn of document.querySelectorAll('.tab')) btn.classList.toggle('active', btn.dataset.tab===id); for(const page of document.querySelectorAll('.tabPage')) page.classList.toggle('hidden', page.id!==id); } for(const btn of document.querySelectorAll('.tab')) btn.addEventListener('click',()=>switchTab(btn.dataset.tab)); // --- mode switch (S2/S3) --- function __setMode(mode){ const isS3 = (mode==='s3'); try{ document.body.classList.toggle('modeS3', isS3); }catch(_e){} try{ if(!isS3) document.body.classList.remove('s3DiagOpen'); }catch(_e){} try{ var b=document.getElementById('btnS3Diag'); if(b && !isS3) b.setAttribute('aria-pressed','false'); }catch(_e){} const bS2 = document.getElementById('modeS2'); const bS3 = document.getElementById('modeS3'); if(bS2&&bS3){ bS2.classList.toggle('active',!isS3); bS3.classList.toggle('active',isS3); } // show/hide tabs for(const btn of document.querySelectorAll('#tabs .tab')){ const isTabS3 = btn.dataset.tab==='tabS3'; btn.style.display = (isS3? isTabS3 : !isTabS3) ? '' : 'none'; } // ensure a valid active tab if(isS3){ switchTab('tabS3'); } else{ switchTab('tabAssets'); } } (function(){ const bS2=document.getElementById('modeS2'); const bS3=document.getElementById('modeS3'); if(bS2) bS2.addEventListener('click',()=>__setMode('s2')); if(bS3) bS3.addEventListener('click',()=>__setMode('s3')); __setMode('s2'); })(); // --- fanart helpers --- const __BLANK_PIXEL__ = 'data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACwAAAAAAQABAAA='; function readAsDataURL(file){ return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{ try { const fr = new FileReader(); fr.onload = ()=> resolve(fr.result); fr.onerror = ()=> reject(fr.error || new Error('FileReader error')); fr.readAsDataURL(file); } catch(e) { reject(e); } }); } function readAsDataURLCompressed(file, maxSide=1024, mime='image/webp', quality=0.85){ // localStorageの容量対策：選択画像（ファンアート/スクロール内画像）は縮小＋再エンコードして保存する return new Promise(async (resolve,reject)=>{ try{ // createImageBitmapが使えない環境もあるためフォールバックを用意 let bmp=null; try{ bmp = await createImageBitmap(file); }catch(_){} if(!bmp){ const url = await readAsDataURL(file); // dataURLのまま返す（最悪ケース） return resolve(url); } const w=bmp.width||1, h=bmp.height||1; const scale = Math.min(1, maxSide/Math.max(w,h)); const cw = Math.max(1, Math.round(w*scale)); const ch = Math.max(1, Math.round(h*scale)); const c=document.createElement('canvas'); c.width=cw; c.height=ch; const ctx=c.getContext('2d', {alpha:true}); ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled=true; ctx.imageSmoothingQuality='high'; ctx.drawImage(bmp,0,0,cw,ch); // toDataURLは同期。mimeが未対応ならpngに落ちる let out=''; try{ out=c.toDataURL(mime, quality); }catch(_){ out=c.toDataURL('image/png'); } resolve(out); }catch(e){ reject(e); } }); } function wireFileInput(fileId, nameId, setter){ const inp=$(fileId); if(!inp) return; inp.addEventListener('change',()=>{ const f=inp.files && inp.files[0]; $(nameId).textContent = f? f.name : '未選択'; if(!f) return; const fr=new FileReader(); fr.onload=()=>{ const url = (typeof fr.result==='string') ? fr.result : ''; if(url){ setter(url, f.name); applyVisual(); saveSettings(); startScroll(); } }; fr.onerror=()=>{ const obj=URL.createObjectURL(f); setter(obj, f.name); applyVisual(); saveSettings(); startScroll(); }; fr.readAsDataURL(f); }); } function syncInputsFromState(){ // names if($('bgName')) $('bgName').textContent = STATE.bgName||'未選択'; if($('monkeyName')) $('monkeyName').textContent = STATE.monkeyName||'未選択'; if($('bearName')) $('bearName').textContent = STATE.bearName||'未選択'; if($('tvImgName')) $('tvImgName').textContent = STATE.tvImgName||'未選択'; if($('barName')) $('barName').textContent = STATE.barName||'未選択'; if($('simgName1')) $('simgName1').textContent = (STATE.simgNames&&STATE.simgNames[0])||'未選択'; if($('simgName2')) $('simgName2').textContent = (STATE.simgNames&&STATE.simgNames[1])||'未選択'; if($('simgName3')) $('simgName3').textContent = (STATE.simgNames&&STATE.simgNames[2])||'未選択'; $('tvImgOpacity').value=String(STATE.tvImgOpacity); $('tvImgOpacityVal').textContent=String(STATE.tvImgOpacity); $('scrollSec').value=String(STATE.scrollSec); $('scrollSecVal').textContent=String(STATE.scrollSec); $('loopEnable').checked=!!STATE.loopEnable; if($('endEffect')) $('endEffect').value = STATE.endEffect || 'none'; $('fontSize').value=String(STATE.fontSize); $('fontSizeVal').textContent=String(STATE.fontSize); $('lineHeight').value=String(STATE.lineHeight); $('lineHeightVal').textContent=String(STATE.lineHeight); if($('hdrGap')){ $('hdrGap').value=String(STATE.hdrGapPx||0); $('hdrGapVal').textContent=String(STATE.hdrGapPx||0); } $('simgScale').value=String(STATE.simgScale); $('simgScaleVal').textContent=String(STATE.simgScale); $('barMaxH').value=String(STATE.barMaxH); $('barMaxHVal').textContent=String(STATE.barMaxH); $('titleText').value=STATE.titleText; $('endText').value=STATE.endText; $('dummyCount').value=String(STATE.dummyCount); $('dummyCountVal').textContent=String(STATE.dummyCount); $('dummyPrefix').value=STATE.dummyPrefix; for(let i=1;i<=5;i++){ const v = STATE.specials[i-1].names||''; $(`specialNames${i}`).value = v; const pv = $(`specialPrev${i}`); if(pv) pv.textContent = v; } $('tvXr').value=STATE.tv.xr; $('tvYr').value=STATE.tv.yr; $('tvWr').value=STATE.tv.wr; $('tvHr').value=STATE.tv.hr; $('tvDebug').checked=!!STATE.tvDebug; if($('camEnable')) $('camEnable').checked=!!(STATE.cam&&STATE.cam.enabled); if($('camX')) $('camX').value=String((STATE.cam&&STATE.cam.x)!=null?STATE.cam.x:0); if($('camY')) $('camY').value=String((STATE.cam&&STATE.cam.y)!=null?STATE.cam.y:0); if($('camW')) $('camW').value=String((STATE.cam&&STATE.cam.w)!=null?STATE.cam.w:0); if($('camH')) $('camH').value=String((STATE.cam&&STATE.cam.h)!=null?STATE.cam.h:0); renderOrderList(); } function readInputsToState(){ STATE.tvImgOpacity=parseInt($('tvImgOpacity').value||'25',10); STATE.scrollSec=parseInt($('scrollSec').value||'30',10); STATE.loopEnable=$('loopEnable').checked; if($('endEffect')) STATE.endEffect = $('endEffect').value || 'none'; STATE.fontSize=parseInt($('fontSize').value||'64',10); STATE.lineHeight=parseFloat($('lineHeight').value||'1.25'); if($('hdrGap')) STATE.hdrGapPx=parseInt($('hdrGap').value||'0',10); STATE.simgScale=parseInt($('simgScale').value||'100',10); STATE.barMaxH=parseInt($('barMaxH').value||'64',10); STATE.titleText=$('titleText').value||'エンドロール'; STATE.endText=$('endText').value||'おわり'; STATE.dummyCount=parseInt($('dummyCount').value||'24',10); STATE.dummyPrefix=$('dummyPrefix').value||'Viewer'; for(let i=1;i<=5;i++){ STATE.specials[i-1].names=$(`specialNames${i}`).value||''; } STATE.tv.xr=clamp(parseFloat($('tvXr').value),0,1); STATE.tv.yr=clamp(parseFloat($('tvYr').value),0,1); STATE.tv.wr=clamp(parseFloat($('tvWr').value),0.000001,1); STATE.tv.hr=clamp(parseFloat($('tvHr').value),0.000001,1); STATE.tvDebug=$('tvDebug').checked; if(!STATE.cam) STATE.cam={enabled:true,x:1454,y:36,w:430,h:242}; if($('camEnable')) STATE.cam.enabled=$('camEnable').checked; if($('camX')) STATE.cam.x=parseInt($('camX').value||'0',10); if($('camY')) STATE.cam.y=parseInt($('camY').value||'0',10); if($('camW')) STATE.cam.w=parseInt($('camW').value||'0',10); if($('camH')) STATE.cam.h=parseInt($('camH').value||'0',10); } let realtimeTimer=null; function scheduleRealtimeApply(){ if(realtimeTimer) clearTimeout(realtimeTimer); realtimeTimer=setTimeout(()=>{ try{ readInputsToState(); $('tvImgOpacityVal').textContent=String(STATE.tvImgOpacity); $('scrollSecVal').textContent=String(STATE.scrollSec); $('fontSizeVal').textContent=String(STATE.fontSize); $('lineHeightVal').textContent=String(STATE.lineHeight); if($('hdrGapVal')) $('hdrGapVal').textContent=String(STATE.hdrGapPx||0); $('simgScaleVal').textContent=String(STATE.simgScale); $('barMaxHVal').textContent=String(STATE.barMaxH); $('dummyCountVal').textContent=String(STATE.dummyCount); for(let i=1;i<=5;i++){ const pv=$(`specialPrev${i}`); if(pv) pv.textContent = $(`specialNames${i}`).value||''; } applyVisual(); saveSettings(); startScroll(); }catch(e){} },80); } function bindRealtime(){ const ids=[ 'tvImgOpacity','scrollSec','loopEnable','endEffect','fontSize','lineHeight','hdrGap','simgScale','barMaxH', 'titleText','endText','dummyCount','dummyPrefix', 'tvXr','tvYr','tvWr','tvHr','tvDebug', 'camEnable','camX','camY','camW','camH', 'specialNames1','specialNames2','specialNames3','specialNames4','specialNames5' ]; for(const id of ids){ const el=$(id); if(!el) continue; el.addEventListener('input',scheduleRealtimeApply); el.addEventListener('change',scheduleRealtimeApply); } } /* drag drop */ function renderOrderList(){ const ul=$('orderList'); if(!ul) return; ul.replaceChildren(); STATE.order.forEach((item,idx)=>{ const li=document.createElement('li'); li.className='orderItem'; li.draggable=true; li.dataset.index=String(idx); const h=el('div','dragHandle','≡'); const t=el('div','orderTitle',item.label); const right=el('div','orderRight'); const enWrap=el('label','miniTag'); const en=document.createElement('input'); en.type='checkbox'; en.checked=!!item.enabled; en.addEventListener('change',()=>{ item.enabled=en.checked; scheduleRealtimeApply(); }); enWrap.appendChild(en); enWrap.appendChild(document.createTextNode(' 有効')); const barWrap=el('label','miniTag'); const bar=document.createElement('input'); bar.type='checkbox'; bar.checked=!!item.barAfter; bar.addEventListener('change',()=>{ item.barAfter=bar.checked; scheduleRealtimeApply(); }); barWrap.appendChild(bar); barWrap.appendChild(document.createTextNode(' バー')); right.appendChild(enWrap); right.appendChild(barWrap); li.appendChild(h); li.appendChild(t); li.appendChild(right); li.addEventListener('dragstart',(e)=>{ e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', String(idx)); }); li.addEventListener('dragover',(e)=>{ e.preventDefault(); li.classList.add('dragOver'); }); li.addEventListener('dragleave',()=>li.classList.remove('dragOver')); li.addEventListener('drop',(e)=>{ e.preventDefault(); li.classList.remove('dragOver'); const from=parseInt(e.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain'),10); const to=parseInt(li.dataset.index,10); if(!isFinite(from)||!isFinite(to)||from===to) return; const moved=STATE.order.splice(from,1)[0]; STATE.order.splice(to,0,moved); renderOrderList(); scheduleRealtimeApply(); }); ul.appendChild(li); }); } function ensureFanartOrderItems(){ const prev = Array.isArray(STATE.order) ? STATE.order : []; const keep = new Map(prev.map(it=>[String(it.id||''), {enabled:!!it.enabled, barAfter:!!it.barAfter}])); // remove existing fanart_* from order STATE.order = prev.filter(it=>!String(it.id||'').startsWith('fanart_')); const slots = Array.isArray(STATE.fanartSlots) ? STATE.fanartSlots : []; for(let i=0;i[String(it.id||''), {enabled:!!it.enabled, barAfter:!!it.barAfter}])); // remove existing simg_ from order AND legacy img1/img2/img3 STATE.order = prev.filter(it=>{ const id=String(it.id||''); if(id.startsWith('simg_')) return false; if(id==='img1'||id==='img2'||id==='img3') return false; return true; }); const slots = Array.isArray(STATE.simgSlots)? STATE.simgSlots : []; for(let i=0;i{ if(!slot) slot = (slots[i] = {text:'', imgs:[], fit:'contain', scale:100}); if(slot.fit==null) slot.fit='contain'; if(slot.scale==null) slot.scale=100; // ensure fixed 9 slots (do NOT auto-pack) if(!Array.isArray(slot.imgs)) slot.imgs=[]; if(slot.imgs.length>9) slot.imgs = slot.imgs.slice(0,9); while(slot.imgs.length<9) slot.imgs.push(''); const card = el('div','fanartCard'); const head = el('div','fanartHead'); head.appendChild(el('span','tag',`#${i+1}`)); const titleInput = document.createElement('input'); titleInput.type='text'; titleInput.value = slot.text || ''; titleInput.placeholder='文言（この枠の見出し）'; titleInput.addEventListener('input',()=>{ slot.text = titleInput.value; scheduleRealtimeApply(); }); head.appendChild(titleInput); card.appendChild(head); // controls: fit / scale (XYは撤去) const ctrl = el('div','row'); ctrl.style.gridTemplateColumns='110px 1fr'; ctrl.style.alignItems='center'; ctrl.style.gap='8px'; const fitL=el('label','', '画像fit'); fitL.style.opacity='.85'; const fitS=document.createElement('select'); fitS.innerHTML=''; fitS.value=slot.fit||'contain'; fitS.addEventListener('change',()=>{ slot.fit=fitS.value; scheduleRealtimeApply(); renderFanartSlots(); }); const scL=el('label','', 'サイズ%'); scL.style.opacity='.85'; const sc=document.createElement('input'); sc.type='range'; sc.min='50'; sc.max='150'; sc.step='1'; sc.value=String(slot.scale ?? 100); const scVal=el('div','note', `${sc.value}%`); sc.addEventListener('input',()=>{ scVal.textContent=`${sc.value}%`; }); sc.addEventListener('change',()=>{ slot.scale=parseInt(sc.value,10)||100; scheduleRealtimeApply(); }); ctrl.appendChild(fitL); ctrl.appendChild(fitS); ctrl.appendChild(scL); const scWrap=el('div','',null); scWrap.appendChild(sc); scWrap.appendChild(scVal); ctrl.appendChild(scWrap); card.appendChild(ctrl); // fixed 3x3 preview grid with per-cell pick/clear const grid = el('div','fanartGrid'); const previews = el('div','fanartPreviews'); previews.style.position='relative'; const pick = document.createElement('input'); pick.type='file'; pick.accept='image/*'; pick.multiple=false; pick.style.display='none'; let pendingIndex = -1; pick.addEventListener('change', async ()=>{ const f = pick.files && pick.files[0]; if(!f || pendingIndex<0){ pick.value=''; pendingIndex=-1; return; } const url = await readAsDataURLCompressed(f, 1024, 'image/webp', 0.85); slot.imgs[pendingIndex] = url; pendingIndex = -1; pick.value=''; scheduleRealtimeApply(); renderFanartSlots(); }); for(let k=0;k<9;k++){ const cell = el('div','fanCell'); cell.style.position='relative'; cell.style.borderRadius='8px'; cell.style.overflow='hidden'; cell.style.cursor='pointer'; cell.style.background='rgba(0,0,0,.22)'; const img = document.createElement('img'); img.src = slot.imgs[k] ? slot.imgs[k] : __BLANK_PIXEL__; img.alt='preview'; img.style.width='100%'; img.style.height='100%'; img.style.objectFit='cover'; cell.appendChild(img); const xbtn = document.createElement('button'); xbtn.type='button'; xbtn.className='miniX'; xbtn.textContent='×'; xbtn.title='この画像を消す'; xbtn.style.position='absolute'; xbtn.style.top='6px'; xbtn.style.right='6px'; xbtn.style.width='22px'; xbtn.style.height='22px'; xbtn.style.borderRadius='999px'; xbtn.style.border='1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18)'; xbtn.style.background='rgba(0,0,0,.55)'; xbtn.style.color='rgba(255,255,255,.92)'; xbtn.style.fontSize='14px'; xbtn.style.lineHeight='18px'; xbtn.style.display = slot.imgs[k] ? 'grid' : 'none'; xbtn.style.placeItems='center'; xbtn.addEventListener('click',(ev)=>{ ev.stopPropagation(); slot.imgs[k]=''; scheduleRealtimeApply(); renderFanartSlots(); }); cell.appendChild(xbtn); cell.addEventListener('click',()=>{ pendingIndex = k; // allow re-select same file pick.value=''; pick.click(); }); previews.appendChild(cell); } const btns = el('div','fanartBtns'); const clearBtn=document.createElement('button'); clearBtn.type='button'; clearBtn.textContent='画像を全消去'; clearBtn.addEventListener('click',()=>{ slot.imgs = new Array(9).fill(''); scheduleRealtimeApply(); renderFanartSlots(); }); const removeBtn=document.createElement('button'); removeBtn.type='button'; removeBtn.className='danger'; removeBtn.textContent='この枠を削除'; removeBtn.addEventListener('click',()=>{ STATE.fanartSlots.splice(i,1); if(STATE.fanartSlots.length===0) STATE.fanartSlots.push({text:'',imgs:new Array(9).fill(''), fit:'contain', scale:100}); ensureFanartOrderItems(); renderOrderList(); scheduleRealtimeApply(); renderFanartSlots(); }); btns.appendChild(clearBtn); btns.appendChild(removeBtn); grid.appendChild(previews); grid.appendChild(btns); card.appendChild(grid); card.appendChild(pick); host.appendChild(card); }); } function renderSimgSlots(){ const host = $('simgSlots'); if(!host) return; host.replaceChildren(); const slots = Array.isArray(STATE.simgSlots)? STATE.simgSlots : (STATE.simgSlots=[]); const rmBtn = $('simgRemoveSlot'); if(rmBtn){ rmBtn.disabled = slots.length<=1; rmBtn.style.opacity = rmBtn.disabled? .45 : 1; } slots.forEach((slot,i)=>{ if(!slot) slot = (slots[i] = {url:'',name:'未選択',fit:'contain',scale:100,x:0,y:0}); if(slot.fit==null) slot.fit='contain'; if(slot.scale==null) slot.scale=100; const card=el('div','fanartCard'); // head const head=el('div','fanartHead'); head.appendChild(el('span','tag',`#${i+1}`)); const name=el('div','orderTitle', slot.name||'未選択'); name.style.fontSize='12px'; name.style.opacity='.9'; name.style.cursor='pointer'; name.title='クリックで画像を選択'; head.appendChild(name); card.appendChild(head); // layout const grid=el('div','simgGrid'); grid.style.display='grid'; grid.style.gridTemplateColumns='260px 1fr'; grid.style.gap='12px'; grid.style.alignItems='stretch'; // preview clickable const preview=el('div','simgPreview'); preview.style.width='260px'; preview.style.height='130px'; preview.style.overflow='hidden'; preview.style.borderRadius='12px'; preview.style.background='rgba(0,0,0,.25)'; preview.style.border='1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10)'; preview.style.position='relative'; preview.style.cursor='pointer'; const img=document.createElement('img'); img.src = slot.url ? slot.url : __BLANK_PIXEL__; img.alt='preview'; img.style.width='100%'; img.style.height='100%'; img.style.objectFit = (slot.fit==='cover')?'cover':'contain'; img.style.display='block'; preview.appendChild(img); const hint=document.createElement('div'); hint.textContent = slot.url ? '' : 'クリックで追加'; hint.style.position='absolute'; hint.style.inset='0'; hint.style.display='grid'; hint.style.placeItems='center'; hint.style.color='rgba(255,255,255,.65)'; hint.style.fontSize='12px'; hint.style.pointerEvents='none'; preview.appendChild(hint); // X button (clear) const xBtn=document.createElement('button'); xBtn.type='button'; xBtn.textContent='×'; xBtn.title='画像を消す'; xBtn.style.position='absolute'; xBtn.style.top='8px'; xBtn.style.right='8px'; xBtn.style.width='28px'; xBtn.style.height='28px'; xBtn.style.borderRadius='10px'; xBtn.style.border='1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18)'; xBtn.style.background='rgba(0,0,0,.35)'; xBtn.style.color='white'; xBtn.style.display = slot.url ? 'grid' : 'none'; xBtn.style.placeItems='center'; xBtn.addEventListener('click',(ev)=>{ ev.stopPropagation(); slot.url=''; slot.name='未選択'; ensureSimgOrderItems(); renderOrderList(); scheduleRealtimeApply(); renderSimgSlots(); }); preview.appendChild(xBtn); // file input const pick=document.createElement('input'); pick.type='file'; pick.accept='image/*'; pick.style.display='none'; pick.addEventListener('change', async ()=>{ const f = pick.files && pick.files[0]; if(!f){ pick.value=''; return; } const url = await readAsDataURLCompressed(f, 1024, 'image/webp', 0.85); slot.url=url; slot.name=f.name||'未選択'; pick.value=''; ensureSimgOrderItems(); renderOrderList(); scheduleRealtimeApply(); renderSimgSlots(); }); const openPick=()=>{ pick.value=''; pick.click(); }; preview.addEventListener('click', openPick); name.addEventListener('click', openPick); // right controls const right=el('div','simgRight'); right.style.display='flex'; right.style.flexDirection='column'; right.style.gap='8px'; right.style.alignItems='stretch'; const controls=el('div','',null); controls.style.display='grid'; controls.style.gridTemplateColumns='110px 1fr'; controls.style.gap='8px'; controls.style.alignItems='center'; const fitLbl=el('label','', 'fit'); fitLbl.style.opacity='.85'; const fitSel=document.createElement('select'); fitSel.innerHTML = ''; fitSel.value = slot.fit||'contain'; fitSel.addEventListener('change',()=>{ slot.fit=fitSel.value; scheduleRealtimeApply(); renderSimgSlots(); }); const scLbl=el('label','', 'サイズ%'); scLbl.style.opacity='.85'; const sc=document.createElement('input'); sc.type='range'; sc.min='50'; sc.max='150'; sc.step='1'; sc.value = String(slot.scale ?? 100); const scVal=el('div','note', `${sc.value}%`); sc.addEventListener('input',()=>{ scVal.textContent=`${sc.value}%`; }); sc.addEventListener('change',()=>{ slot.scale=parseInt(sc.value,10)||100; scheduleRealtimeApply(); }); controls.appendChild(fitLbl); controls.appendChild(fitSel); controls.appendChild(scLbl); const scWrap=el('div','',null); scWrap.appendChild(sc); scWrap.appendChild(scVal); controls.appendChild(scWrap); right.appendChild(controls); right.appendChild(pick); grid.appendChild(preview); grid.appendChild(right); card.appendChild(grid); host.appendChild(card); }); } /* init */ loadSettings(); try{ if(window.STATE && STATE.__s3){ delete STATE.__s3; } }catch(_e){} ensureFanartOrderItems(); applyDefaults(); // Force TV rect from default background (background-priority). This prevents stale localStorage values from earlier versions. const __TV_RECT_BG_DEFAULT__ = {xr:0.23876953125, yr:0.19010416666666666, wr:0.533203125, hr:0.4444444444444444}; if(STATE.bgName===DEFAULT_ASSETS.bgName){ STATE.tv.xr=__TV_RECT_BG_DEFAULT__.xr; STATE.tv.yr=__TV_RECT_BG_DEFAULT__.yr; STATE.tv.wr=__TV_RECT_BG_DEFAULT__.wr; STATE.tv.hr=__TV_RECT_BG_DEFAULT__.hr; } wireFileInput('bgFile','bgName',(url,name)=>{STATE.bgUrl=url;STATE.bgName=name||'未選択';}); wireFileInput('monkeyFile','monkeyName',(url,name)=>{STATE.monkeyUrl=url;STATE.monkeyName=name||'未選択';}); wireFileInput('bearFile','bearName',(url,name)=>{STATE.bearUrl=url;STATE.bearName=name||'未選択';}); wireFileInput('tvImgFile','tvImgName',(url,name)=>{STATE.tvImgUrl=url;STATE.tvImgName=name||'未選択';}); wireFileInput('barFile','barName',(url,name)=>{STATE.barUrl=url;STATE.barName=name||'未選択';}); wireFileInput('simgFile1','simgName1',(url,name)=>{STATE.simgUrls[0]=url;STATE.simgNames[0]=name||'未選択';}); wireFileInput('simgFile2','simgName2',(url,name)=>{STATE.simgUrls[1]=url;STATE.simgNames[1]=name||'未選択';}); wireFileInput('simgFile3','simgName3',(url,name)=>{STATE.simgUrls[2]=url;STATE.simgNames[2]=name||'未選択';}); bindRealtime(); $('fanartAddSlot').addEventListener('click',()=>{ if(!Array.isArray(STATE.fanartSlots)) STATE.fanartSlots=[]; STATE.fanartSlots.push({text:'',imgs:[]}); ensureFanartOrderItems(); renderOrderList(); scheduleRealtimeApply(); renderFanartSlots(); }); applyVisual(); syncInputsFromState(); ensureFanartOrderItems(); ensureSimgOrderItems(); renderOrderList(); renderFanartSlots(); renderSimgSlots(); const simgAdd=$('simgAddSlot'); if(simgAdd){ simgAdd.addEventListener('click',()=>{ if(!Array.isArray(STATE.simgSlots)) STATE.simgSlots=[]; STATE.simgSlots.push({url:'',name:'未選択',fit:'contain',scale:100,x:0,y:0}); ensureSimgOrderItems(); renderOrderList(); scheduleRealtimeApply(); renderSimgSlots(); }); } startScroll();
